# Korean Josa i18n Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Replace Korean placeholder text like `$TITLE$이(가)` and `$TITLE$을(를)` with precise particles generated by `es-hangul`'s `josa` function.

**Architecture:** Add one shared Korean particle formatter that only changes substitutions when the UI language is Korean. Existing non-Korean locale messages continue receiving the raw title, while Korean messages receive a title placeholder with the correct particle already attached.

**Tech Stack:** React 19, TypeScript, Vitest, Testing Library, `webextension-polyfill`, `browser.i18n`, `es-hangul@2.3.8`.

---

## File Structure

### Create

- `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.ts`
  - Owns Korean UI-language detection and title particle formatting.
  - Imports `josa` from `es-hangul`.
  - Imports `browser` from `webextension-polyfill` only to read `browser.i18n.getUILanguage()` by default.

- `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts`
  - Unit tests for Korean vs non-Korean UI languages, quoted titles, object particles, and empty titles.

### Modify

- `src/shared/lib/index.ts`
  - Re-export the formatter for popup/content script imports.

- `src/shared/lib/README.md`
  - Add `korean-josa.ts` to the module table.

- `src/contentScripts/components/sync-suggestion-toast.tsx`
  - Use `formatTitleWithKoreanJosa(..., '이/가', { quote: true })` for Add-tab suggestion title placeholders.
  - The formatter must choose the particle from the raw title, then add quotes for display. Calling `josa('"칫솔"', '이/가')` chooses `가` from the trailing quote and is incorrect.

- `src/popup/components/selected-tabs-chips.tsx`
  - Use `formatTitleWithKoreanJosa(..., '을/를')` for the disabled remove button aria-label while sync is active.

- `src/shared/i18n/_locales/ko/messages.json`
  - Remove literal `이(가)` / `을(를)` around `$TITLE$` because the title placeholder will include the correct particle.

- `extension/_locales/ko/messages.json`
  - Mirror the Korean message changes for extension locale parity.

### Do Not Modify

- Non-Korean locale message text. Those messages still receive raw titles and keep their existing quote / grammar structure.
- `package.json` or `pnpm-lock.yaml`. `es-hangul` is already installed and used by `src/shared/lib/korean-search.ts`.

---

## Task 1: Add Shared Korean Josa Formatter

**Files:**

- Create: `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.ts`
- Create: `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts`
- Modify: `src/shared/lib/index.ts`
- Modify: `src/shared/lib/README.md`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing helper tests**

Create `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts`:

```typescript
import { describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import browser from 'webextension-polyfill';

import {
  formatTitleWithKoreanJosa,
  isKoreanUiLanguage,
  type KoreanJosaParticle,
} from './korean-josa';

vi.mock('webextension-polyfill', () => ({
  default: {
    i18n: {
      getUILanguage: vi.fn(() => 'ko'),
    },
  },
}));

describe('isKoreanUiLanguage', () => {
  it.each(['ko', 'ko-KR', 'ko_KR', 'KO-kr'])('detects Korean locale %s', (language) => {
    expect(isKoreanUiLanguage(language)).toBe(true);
  });

  it.each(['en', 'en-US', 'ja', 'zh_CN', ''])('rejects non-Korean locale %s', (language) => {
    expect(isKoreanUiLanguage(language)).toBe(false);
  });
});

describe('formatTitleWithKoreanJosa', () => {
  it('adds subject particle after a Korean title with batchim', () => {
    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('칫솔', '이/가', { quote: true, uiLanguage: 'ko' })).toBe(
      '"칫솔"이',
    );
  });

  it('adds subject particle after a Korean title without batchim', () => {
    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('샴푸', '이/가', { quote: true, uiLanguage: 'ko-KR' })).toBe(
      '"샴푸"가',
    );
  });

  it('adds object particle without quotes for popup aria labels', () => {
    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('칫솔', '을/를', { uiLanguage: 'ko' })).toBe('칫솔을');
    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('샴푸', '을/를', { uiLanguage: 'ko' })).toBe('샴푸를');
  });

  it('falls back to the browser UI language when uiLanguage is omitted', () => {
    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('칫솔', '이/가', { quote: true })).toBe('"칫솔"이');
    expect(browser.i18n.getUILanguage).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('returns the raw title for non-Korean UI languages', () => {
    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('칫솔', '이/가', { quote: true, uiLanguage: 'en' })).toBe(
      '칫솔',
    );
  });

  it('returns an empty title unchanged', () => {
    const particle: KoreanJosaParticle = '이/가';

    expect(formatTitleWithKoreanJosa('', particle, { quote: true, uiLanguage: 'ko' })).toBe('');
  });
});
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run the new test to verify it fails**

Run:

```bash
pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts
```

Expected: FAIL because `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.ts` does not exist.

- [ ] **Step 3: Add the minimal formatter implementation**

Create `src/shared/lib/korean-josa.ts`:

```typescript
import { josa } from 'es-hangul';
import browser from 'webextension-polyfill';

export type KoreanJosaParticle =
  | '이/가'
  | '을/를'
  | '은/는'
  | '으로/로'
  | '와/과'
  | '이나/나'
  | '이란/란'
  | '아/야'
  | '이랑/랑'
  | '이에요/예요'
  | '으로서/로서'
  | '으로써/로써'
  | '으로부터/로부터'
  | '이라/라';

interface KoreanJosaOptions {
  quote?: boolean;
  uiLanguage?: string;
}

export function isKoreanUiLanguage(uiLanguage: string): boolean {
  const normalizedLanguage = uiLanguage.toLowerCase().replace('_', '-');

  return normalizedLanguage === 'ko' || normalizedLanguage.startsWith('ko-');
}

export function formatTitleWithKoreanJosa(
  title: string,
  particle: KoreanJosaParticle,
  options: KoreanJosaOptions = {},
): string {
  if (title.length === 0) {
    return title;
  }

  const uiLanguage = options.uiLanguage ?? browser.i18n.getUILanguage();

  if (!isKoreanUiLanguage(uiLanguage)) {
    return title;
  }

  const titleWithParticle = josa(title, particle);

  if (!options.quote) {
    return titleWithParticle;
  }

  const selectedParticle = titleWithParticle.slice(title.length);

  return `"${title}"${selectedParticle}`;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Export the formatter**

Modify `src/shared/lib/index.ts` by adding this export near the Korean utility exports:

```typescript
export {
  formatTitleWithKoreanJosa,
  isKoreanUiLanguage,
  type KoreanJosaParticle,
} from './korean-josa';
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Document the helper module**

Modify the module table in `src/shared/lib/README.md` by inserting this row after `korean-search.ts`:

```markdown
| `korean-josa.ts` | — | Korean particle formatting for localized UI placeholders | Yes |
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Run the helper test to verify it passes**

Run:

```bash
pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts
```

Expected: PASS with 15 tests.

- [ ] **Step 7: Commit**

```bash
git add src/shared/lib/korean-josa.ts src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts src/shared/lib/index.ts src/shared/lib/README.md
git commit -m "feat: add Korean josa title formatter"
```

## Task 2: Apply Josa Formatting to Add-Tab Toast Titles

**Files:**

- Modify: `src/contentScripts/components/sync-suggestion-toast.tsx`
- Modify: `src/shared/i18n/_locales/ko/messages.json`
- Modify: `extension/_locales/ko/messages.json`

- [ ] **Step 1: Update the Korean shared locale messages**

Modify `src/shared/i18n/_locales/ko/messages.json` so the three Add-tab messages become:

```json
  "newTabSameUrl": {
    "message": "새 탭 $TITLE$ 동일한 URL입니다. 동기화에 추가할까요?",
    "placeholders": {
      "title": {
        "content": "$1",
        "example": "\"Google Docs\"가"
      }
    }
  },
  "newTabSameTranslatedPage": {
    "message": "새 탭 $TITLE$ 동일한 번역 페이지입니다. 동기화에 추가할까요?",
    "placeholders": {
      "title": {
        "content": "$1",
        "example": "\"Google Docs\"가"
      }
    }
  },
  "newTabMayBeTranslation": {
    "message": "새 탭 $TITLE$ 동기화 중인 페이지의 번역본일 수 있습니다. 동기화에 추가할까요?",
    "placeholders": {
      "title": {
        "content": "$1",
        "example": "\"Google Docs\"가"
      }
    }
  },
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Mirror the extension Korean locale messages**

Apply the exact same JSON block changes to `extension/_locales/ko/messages.json`.

- [ ] **Step 3: Use the formatter in AddTabSuggestionToast**

Modify `src/contentScripts/components/sync-suggestion-toast.tsx`.

Add this import after the animation imports:

```typescript
import { formatTitleWithKoreanJosa } from '~/shared/lib';
```

Inside `AddTabSuggestionToast`, before `handleAccept`, add:

```text
  const titleWithSubjectJosa = formatTitleWithKoreanJosa(suggestion.tabTitle, '이/가', {
    quote: true,
  });
```

Then replace:

```text
{t(getAddTabSuggestionTitleKey(suggestion), suggestion.tabTitle)}
```

with:

```text
{t(getAddTabSuggestionTitleKey(suggestion), titleWithSubjectJosa)}
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Validate locale key parity**

Run:

```bash
pnpm i18n:validate
```

Expected: PASS with `✓ All locale files have identical keys and valid messages!`.

If the Codex sandbox reports `Error: listen EPERM ... tsx-501/*.pipe`, rerun the same command with elevated permissions. That EPERM is a local sandbox IPC restriction, not an i18n failure.

- [ ] **Step 5: Run TypeScript and focused tests**

Run:

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/lib/korean-josa.test.ts
```

Expected: both commands PASS.

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit**

```bash
git add src/contentScripts/components/sync-suggestion-toast.tsx src/shared/i18n/_locales/ko/messages.json extension/_locales/ko/messages.json
git commit -m "fix(i18n): apply Korean josa to add-tab titles"
```

## Task 3: Apply Josa Formatting to Popup Disabled Remove Labels

**Files:**

- Modify: `src/popup/components/selected-tabs-chips.tsx`
- Modify: `src/shared/i18n/_locales/ko/messages.json`
- Modify: `extension/_locales/ko/messages.json`

- [ ] **Step 1: Update the Korean shared locale message**

Modify `src/shared/i18n/_locales/ko/messages.json` so `cannotRemoveTabDuringSync` becomes:

```json
  "cannotRemoveTabDuringSync": {
    "message": "동기화 중에는 $TITLE$ 제거할 수 없습니다",
    "placeholders": {
      "title": {
        "content": "$1",
        "example": "Google을"
      }
    }
  },
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Mirror the extension Korean locale message**

Apply the exact same `cannotRemoveTabDuringSync` change to `extension/_locales/ko/messages.json`.

- [ ] **Step 3: Use the formatter in SelectedTabsChips**

Modify `src/popup/components/selected-tabs-chips.tsx`.

Add this import after the animation imports:

```typescript
import { formatTitleWithKoreanJosa } from '~/shared/lib';
```

Inside `tabs.map((tab) => ( ... ))`, convert the arrow body to a block body so each tab can compute the label once:

```typescript
{tabs.map((tab) => {
  const titleWithObjectJosa = formatTitleWithKoreanJosa(tab.title, '을/를');

  return (
    <motion.div
      key={tab.id}
      layout
      animate={motionVariants.scale.animate}
      exit={motionVariants.scale.exit}
      initial={motionVariants.scale.initial}
      transition={getMotionTransition(
        ANIMATION_DURATIONS.fast,
        EASING_FUNCTIONS.easeOutCubic,
      )}
    >
      <Badge className="flex items-center gap-1.5 pr-1 py-1 max-w-[200px]" variant="secondary">
        <Avatar className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0">
          <AvatarImage alt="" src={tab.favIconUrl} />
          <AvatarFallback className="bg-muted text-[8px] text-muted-foreground">
            ?
          </AvatarFallback>
        </Avatar>
        <span className="text-xs truncate flex-1">{tab.title}</span>
        <Button
          aria-label={
            isSyncActive
              ? t('cannotRemoveTabDuringSync', [titleWithObjectJosa])
              : t('removeTab', [tab.title])
          }
          className="h-4 w-4 p-0 hover:bg-muted rounded-sm shrink-0"
          disabled={isSyncActive}
          size="icon"
          variant="ghost"
          onClick={(e) => {
            if (!isSyncActive) {
              e.stopPropagation();
              onRemoveTab(tab.id);
            }
          }}
        >
          <IconX aria-hidden="true" className="h-3 w-3" />
        </Button>
      </Badge>
    </motion.div>
  );
})}
```

## Self-Review

### Spec Coverage

- Korean `이(가)` in translated Add-tab messages: covered by Task 2.
- Korean `을(를)` in popup disabled remove label: covered by Task 3.
- Use `es-hangul` `josa`: covered by Task 1 implementation.
- Avoid changing non-Korean UX: covered by `formatTitleWithKoreanJosa` returning raw title for non-Korean UI languages.
- Preserve extension/shared locale parity: covered by Tasks 2, 3, and i18n validation steps.
- Keep PR #377 stacked on PR #376 branch: covered by Task 4 Step 9.

### Placeholder Scan

No `TBD`, `TODO`, “implement later”, or unspecified test instructions remain. Every code-changing step includes exact code or exact replacement text.

### Type Consistency

- Helper type name is consistently `KoreanJosaParticle`.
- Helper function name is consistently `formatTitleWithKoreanJosa`.
- UI language function name is consistently `isKoreanUiLanguage`.
- Component imports use `~/shared/lib`, matching the barrel export added in Task 1.
